title: Knysna Municipality signs R2 million MOU with KIG: First partnership under new community policy
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Municipality and the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Municipality and the Knysna Infrastructure group (KIG) today signed a R2 million memorandum of understanding (MOU) - the first partnership under the new Community Partnerships Policy.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Municipality and the Knysna Infrastructure group (KIG) today signed a R2 million memorandum of understanding (MOU) - the first partnership under the new Community Partnerships Policy."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The signing, held at the Knysna council chambers, marks a major milestone in the municipality's drive to formalise co-operation with local civic organisations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The agreement is the first to be concluded since Council adopted the policy on Community Partnerships on 30 October.","html":"The agreement is the first to be concluded since Council adopted the policy on Community Partnerships on 30 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photo: Rozano Alie","html":"Photo: Rozano Alie"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Knysna Municipality signs R2 million MOU with KIG: First partnership under new community policy
